phrase.STOPPED_AT_SIGNAL_READY_TO_ENTER: Stopped at signal, ready to enter
phrase.ACCEPTED_HELPER_DETACH_AT_STATION: Acknowledged. Helper loco will detach at station

phrase.RADIO_LINK_RESTORED: Reporting brief loss of radio contact, now restored.
phrase.LEVEL_CROSSING_GATES_OPEN: Level crossing gates open before station
phrase.TRAIN_TRACK_1_FREE_RECEIVE_TRACK_1: Train, track one clear, receive on track one.

phrase.WRONG_ROAD_FROM_POST_TO_STATION: From post to station, wrong road running.

phrase.SHUNTING_EXTRA_CAUTION_THROUGH_POINTS: Shunt with extra caution through points
